name: pet
description: CLI 编程伴侣宠物 — Pet Buddy for Codex CLI

interface.shortDescription: Your coding companion pet that reacts to your work
interface.longDescription: Pet Buddy gives you a persistent virtual pet that reacts to your coding activity. Write code and your pet gets curious; pass tests and it celebrates; fail tests and it comforts you. Features mood, hunger, bond, and leveling systems.
defaultPrompt: Use Pet Buddy to track my coding companion pet
Check on my pet with /pet status
